name: R.P.P. Infra Projects Limited
summary: R.P.P. Infra Projects Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction and infrastructure development activities in India, Sri Lanka, Mauritius, and Gabon. The company undertakes civil construction, building projects, and irrigation and water supply projects; and infrastructure construction works, including roads, buildings, industrial structures, and power and irrigation projects, as well as hotels, hospitals, educational institutions. It also provides infrastructure projects related consultancy services; and procures, sells, and supplies electricity from various sources, including coal and thermal energy, bio-mass, bio-gas, etc. In addition, the company acts as a distributor, agent, trader, merchant, contractor, broker, and dealer in various merchandise and articles, including clearing agents, freight contractors, forwarding agents, licensing agents, and general brokers, as well as carries commercial business. R.P.P. Infra Projects Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Chennai, India.
